reviews.author: Nicole Kelly
reviews.text: Probably the only locksmith that's actually 24 hours in Atlanta. I called at 1am after being locked out and they came right out. Professional, fast, and fair pricing.

reviews.author: modern tiny
reviews.text: 10/10. Back in my car at such a late time, and in less than 30 minutes.

reviews.author: Google Customer
reviews.text: Jeff did a great job and quick. Amazing customer service and affordable prices.

reviews.author: ChamberOfCommerce
reviews.text: Absolutely excellent throughout. Courteous, prompt visit, informed, knowledgeable, technically proficient.

reviews.author: Yellow Pages
reviews.text: I called and they called me back right away and sent someone out super quick.

notes: Atlanta Pro Locksmith. Named tech: Jeff. 24/7 locksmith service. Atlanta (1450 Wembley Ct NE 30329). Phone (770) 637-1730. 4.4/50 across Google, Chamber, Yellow Pages.
